text: I wake up at 6:30 every morning, even on weekends. First, I drink a glass of water and stretch for five minutes. Then, I have a simple breakfast, usually oatmeal and coffee. My work schedule is regular: I start at 8:00 AM and finish at 5:00 PM. After work, I exercise for 30 minutes. Some days I go for a run, and other days I do yoga at home. In the evening, I prepare dinner and read a book or watch a show. I make sure to be in bed by 10:30 PM. This routine keeps me healthy and productive, and I like the consistency of it.
